privileged_info_summary: All entities and data in this task are fictional and based on Grand Theft Auto V game data. Trevor Philips is a playable GTA V character (id=3 in OpenCAD database). Del Perro Boulevard is a real GTA V location. The vehicle Pegassi Infernus is a GTA V supercar. Legal references are authentic: 10-80 is a real police code for pursuit, evading police officer is a real California felony charge (Vehicle Code 2800.2), and reckless driving fines of $750 are typical in the US ($300-$1,000 range). The vehicle plate BLC-4491 is scenario-specific and not pre-existing in seed data. No real personal information or identities are involved.
